description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Embedded build that runs on every push. The workflow has three jobs: rpi64, which builds and uploads a Raspberry Pi 64-bit image using an Arch Linux container; rpi_test, which prepares a sysroot, installs build tools, and builds a Raspberry Pi Bookworm ARMHF image; and an optional commented job for Raspberry Pi 32-bit. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and uploads the build as an artifact.
